text:
终于给 CodePilot 做了设计师该做的功能！

现在支持精心配置的 13 套主题切换，都区分亮暗模式！

灵感来自比较流行的 Vscode 主题再演绎

现在咱这个产品的颜值真的拉满，你也可以自己设计自己的主题，后面会支持加载 https://t.co/8VcRDKwQlJ
I would like to understand if the fruit fly upload thing is real - haven't seen an academic paper, just a video and a tweet thread. Is there one?

Everyone leaving a comment who is saying there is more information - links, please?

Seems like a big leap over FlyWire and NeuroMechFly v2, at least in terms of their claims.

This is 100% correct

And the best producers and lyricists are the ones who studied the game infinitely instead of mashing random buttons on launchpad

Learn software engineering and system design
Stop spamming prompts + spinning up localhosts, and instead build something real

QQ 机器人接入龙虾实在是太丝滑了
点一个按钮，剩下的粘贴给🦞
相比飞书相比微信，QQ 还是太现金了

除了这玩意儿的入口你很难找到之外。。。。
入口在这里：https://t.co/Or2GuentKz https://t.co/mxQkcxJwjj
